en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 56

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 56
Top Question of the Week
What is all of this I am hearing about #cc0summer?
2020: DeFi Summer
2021: NFT Summer
2022: CC0 Summer
It looks like we’re in for a hot one this time round. And it couldn’t be better timing. The DIGITALAX protocol is fully CC0 and frankly all the best projects are.
CC0 spreads maximum usage to all future creators and collectors. It’s the best way to raise floors, gain recognition and inspire the industry continuing to move forward.
Most Common Repeat Question
I keep seeing all of this amazing art generated by Midjourney, Dall-E 2 and Disco Diffusion, how much do we have to worry that AI is going to replace web3 fashion designers?

You might wonder whether these words were written by GPT-3. But, in our opinion you don’t have to worry about it at all. The more creative and ingenious the practice of a field the less that you have to worry about AI taking over. Even while it is a very serious concern for far more than half of more routine jobs.

In creative fields, like web3 fashion design, these diffusion models and other neural nets offer instead a shockingly imaginative enhancement to the tools available to you. Figuring out just what makes them tick and how best to make use of them is the real trick.

But once you’ve gotten the hang of prompt engineering and all of the rest it’s truly something special to see some of the results that you can come up with. At the very least, generative models in web3 fashion design offer an extended module to your waking dreamlike imagination, where coming up with fascinating new ideas, rough sketches and the overall gist of scenes is significantly accelerated. You can now create entire universes inside the metaverse at radically lower cost and time and effort, allowing you to concentrate on the talents that truly make you unique.
Top Controversies

Yes, we know obviously the Swastika has a 5,000 year history outside of being the most iconic symbol for the worst regime and death cult in history, and it is still used today in religious communities throughout South and East Asia. But what we’ve failed to see anywhere in the reaction to the news that the Binance team decided that the Swastika is A-Ok for use as their new emoji logo is anyone asking what in the world Binance or CZ has to do with specifically Hinduism, Jainism or certain aspects of Buddhism.

Binance has a fully global team that is extremely unlikely to not have immediately known if it wasn’t intentional in the first place that the strongest connotation with a Swastika would be something Nazi related.
It seems weak to waive away the actions of the design team as just some mistake or lack of editorial oversight. It’s much more likely to be a trolling hit and run to shift the Overton Window.
Silly Fails and Trolling
Most of our Twitter notifications for the past week or more have been spammed with anon tags and giveaways. Not that it wasn’t happening before, but gosh, it’s certainly amped up.
Best way to overcoming this is none other than Twitter fully open sourcing and embracing web3.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
What is all من this I am hearing about #cc0summer?
2020: صيف DeFi
2021: صيف NFT
2022: صيف CC0
It looks like we’re في لـ a hot one this time round. و it couldn’t be better timing. ال DIGITALAX بروتوكول is fully CC0 و frankly all ال best projects are.
CC0 spreads maximum usage الى all future creators و collectors. It’s ال best way الى raise floors, gain recognition و inspire ال industry continuing الى move forward.
Most Common Repeat سؤال
I keep seeing all من this amazing art generated by Midjourney, Dall-E 2 و Disco Diffusion, ازاي much do we have الى worry that ذكاء اصطناعي is going الى replace web3 فاشون designers?

You might wonder whether these words were written by GPT-3. But, في our opinion you don’t have الى worry about it at all. ال more ابداعي و ingenious ال practice من a field ال less that you have الى worry about ذكاء اصطناعي taking over. Even while it is a very serious concern لـ far more than half من more routine jobs.

في ابداعي fields, like web3 فاشون design, these diffusion models و other neural nets offer instead a shockingly imaginative enhancement الى ال tools available الى you. Figuring out just what makes them tick و ازاي best الى make use من them is ال real trick.

But once you’ve gotten ال hang من prompt engineering و all من ال rest it’s truly something special الى see some من ال results that you can come up مع. At ال very least, generative models في web3 فاشون design offer an extended module الى your waking dreamlike imagination, where coming up مع fascinating جديد ideas, rough sketches و ال overall gist من scenes is significantly accelerated. You can now create entire universes inside ال metaverse at radically lower cost و time و effort, allowing you الى concentrate على ال talents that truly make you unique.
أهم الجدل في المجال

Yes, we know obviously ال Swastika has a 5,000 year history outside من being ال most iconic symbol لـ ال worst regime و death cult في history, و it is still used today في religious communities throughout South و East Asia. But what we’ve failed الى see anywhere في ال reaction الى ال news that ال Binance team decided that ال Swastika is A-Ok لـ use as their جديد emoji logo is anyone asking what في ال world Binance or CZ has الى do مع specifically Hinduism, Jainism or certain aspects من Buddhism.

Binance has a fully global team that is extremely unlikely الى not have immediately known if it wasn’t intentional في ال first place that ال strongest connotation مع a Swastika would be something Nazi related.
It seems weak الى waive away ال actions من ال design team as just some mistake or lack من editorial oversight. It’s much more likely الى be a trolling hit و run الى shift ال Overton Window.
Silly Fails و Trolling
Most من our Twitter notifications لـ ال past اسبوع or more have been spammed مع anon tags و giveaways. Not that it wasn’t happening before, but gosh, it’s certainly amped up.
Best way الى overcoming this is none other than Twitter fully open sourcing و embracing web3.
